metadata.description: Log Analytics workspace name connected to Microsoft Sentinel.

properties.serializedData: {"version": "Notebook/1.0", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "# BitSight Risk Findings Overview\nMonitor reduced-scope BitSight WARN and BAD findings by company, risk vector, and trend."}, "name": "title"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "BitsightRiskFindings_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid | summarize Warn=countif(normalized_risk_state == 'warn'), Bad=countif(normalized_risk_state == 'bad')", "size": 0, "title": "Current WARN vs BAD Findings", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 604800000}, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "visualization": "tiles", "tileSettings": {"showBorder": true}}, "name": "warnBadTiles"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "BitsightRiskFindings_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid | where normalized_risk_state in ('warn','bad') | summarize Findings=count() by company_name | top 10 by Findings desc", "size": 0, "title": "Top Companies by Findings", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 604800000}, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "visualization": "barchart"}, "name": "topCompanies"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "BitsightRiskFindings_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid | where normalized_risk_state in ('warn','bad') | summarize Findings=count() by risk_vector_label, normalized_risk_state | order by Findings desc", "size": 0, "title": "Findings by Risk Vector", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 604800000}, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "visualization": "table"}, "name": "riskVectors"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "BitsightRiskFindings_CL | where normalized_risk_state in ('warn','bad') | summarize Findings=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), normalized_risk_state | render timechart", "size": 0, "title": "Finding Trend Over Time", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 1209600000}, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "visualization": "linechart"}, "name": "trend"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "BitsightRiskFindings_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid | where normalized_risk_state in ('warn','bad') | project TimeGenerated, company_name, risk_vector_label, normalized_risk_state, severity, severity_category, first_seen, last_seen, finding_uid | order by TimeGenerated desc", "size": 0, "title": "Latest Findings", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 604800000}, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "visualization": "table"}, "name": "latestFindings"}], "isLocked": false, "fallbackResourceIds": []}
